name: Two Bean Tofu Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the black beans.
2. Freeze, thaw, and squeeze out the tofu, then tear into pieces.
3. In a mixing bowl, whisk together half the tomato paste, soy sauce, mustard, garlic, oregano, red wine, and basil.
4. Add the tofu and stir to coat.
5. In a large pot, sauté the tofu mixture in half the oil until the liquid has been absorbed and the tofu is browned. Remove from heat.
6. In a small pot, sauté the onions in the remaining oil until transparent.
7. Add the onions to the tofu mixture.
8. Also add the tomatoes, the rest of the tomato paste, chili powder, cumin, salt, and pepper.
9. Also add the black beans. Simmer on low heat for 30 to 40 minutes until the beans are tender.
10. Add the kidney beans and cook another 10 minutes.
11. Add parsley and cilantro; cook for an additional 5 minutes.
12. Check seasonings and serve with cornbread.
